title: Vacations
questions: Where did you go on your last holiday?
Where are you planning on going for your next holiday?
Which countries are top of the list of countries you would like to visit?
Which countries don't appeal to you?
Have you been abroad many times? Where have you been?
Which travel destinations did you most enjoy as a child? Have your tastes changed?
Did you ever go on a school exchange when you were a teenager? Where did you go? How did you find the experience?
Who is you favourite travel companion? Why?
Which continents appeal to you most? Which don't appeal to you so much? Why/why not?
Could you describe your best experience abroad?
Do you prefer to travel alone, with one other person, in a small group or in a large group? What are the advantages and disadvantages?
Have you ever travelled anywhere dangerous? What precautions did you take?
What precautions is it necessary to take, even when travelling in safer countries?
